title: Scenario B - Ammeter Parallel Miswire
subtitle: A measurement error that is electrically detectable and pedagogically interpretable.
lab_task: Measure branch current without bypassing the target load.
learning_objective: Distinguish current measurement from voltage observation.
presentation_summary: The solver detects a measurable state, but the instrumentation strategy collapses the intended branch logic.
teacher_note: This scenario is useful for showing that a circuit may still be numerically solvable while remaining instructionally incorrect.
